title: MODULES
body: Verify the modules you need are installed and running: Platform, OPC-UA, Tag Historian, Perspective (or Vision), and a database driver.
code:
Essential:
  ✓ Platform        (always present)
  ✓ OPC-UA          (PLC comms)
  ✓ Tag Historian   (data logging)
  ✓ Perspective     (modern web UI)
  ✓ AB / Modbus     (PLC driver)
  ✓ SQL Bridge      (DB transactions)
Optional:
  - Vision  (legacy thick client)
  - Reporting / Web Developer / SFC
key: OPC-UA is required for PLC comms
You need at least ONE PLC driver module
mistakes: Uninstalling modules you might need later
